name: IAMGOLD Corporation
description: IAMGOLD Corporation is an intermediate gold producer and developer based in Canada with operating mines in North America and West Africa. The company's portfolio includes the Essakane mine in Burkina Faso, the Westwood mine in Quebec, Canada, and the Côté Gold mine in Ontario, Canada, which is a large-scale, long-life project developed in partnership with Sumitomo Metal Mining. IAMGOLD is committed to maintaining high standards of environmental, social, and governance practices while pursuing growth through exploration and strategic development of its core assets.
